name: lumina-tutor
description: Lumina is a premium, voice-enabled web application and AI study tutor designed to help you master **Large Language Models (LLMs)** and **Agentic AI** in 30 days. It simplifies complex mathematical and algorithmic concepts into plain English using interactive animations, code snippets, and audio-visual explanations.

scripts.build: powershell -Command "Copy-Item index.html, style.css, app.js, curriculum.js, visualizer.js, manifest.json, sw.js -Destination www -Force"
scripts.sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
